name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — mind sharing how it went?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favourite place, so it genuinely means a lot that you trusted us with your visit.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd really appreciate a quick review — honest reviews help other folks who are nervous about finding a dentist feel a little less scared about walking in the door:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if something wasn't quite right during your visit, please just hit reply and let us know — we'd much rather hear from you directly so we can make it right.

Take care,
The Bright Smile Dental team

Hey {{firstName}}, quick one from Bright Smile Dental — if you have 30 seconds, a short review really helps us out: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. No pressure, and thanks again for visiting!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
